---
title: "Regulatory Landscape"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="proj-page">

  <div class="proj-back">
    <a href="/projects/crypto/" class="proj-back-link">← Crypto &amp; Financial Crime</a>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-header">
    <div class="proj-header-inner">
      <p class="proj-eyebrow">Research Thread · Regulatory Landscape</p>
      <h1 class="proj-title">Virtual Assets &amp; the AML Regime</h1>
      <p class="proj-subtitle">How FATF, Singapore, and the EU are trying to regulate what they can barely see</p>
      <hr class="proj-header-rule">
      <div class="proj-tag-row">
        <span class="proj-tag">FATF R.15</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">MAS PSN02</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">MiCA · TFR</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Travel Rule</span>
        <span class="proj-tag proj-tag--status">Draft in progress ◉</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-body">

    <!-- SECTION I -->
    <div class="proj-section">
      <div class="proj-section-marker">
        <span class="proj-section-num">I</span>
        <div class="proj-section-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-section-content">
        <h2 class="proj-section-title">The Structural Problem</h2>
        <div class="proj-prose">
          <p><em>Coming soon — why crypto breaks conventional AML logic. Pseudonymity at the address level, instant cross-border transfer with no correspondent banking layer, programmable obfuscation, and a global ledger that is simultaneously transparent and hard to attribute.</em></p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SECTION II -->
    <div class="proj-section">
      <div class="proj-section-marker">
        <span class="proj-section-num">II</span>
        <div class="proj-section-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-section-content">
        <h2 class="proj-section-title">FATF and the Attempt at Global Standard-Setting</h2>
        <div class="proj-prose">
          <p><em>Coming soon — Recommendation 15, the Travel Rule, and the 2023 finding that 75% of jurisdictions remain only partially or non-compliant. The gap between standard-setting and real-world implementation is itself the story.</em></p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SECTION III -->
    <div class="proj-section">
      <div class="proj-section-marker">
        <span class="proj-section-num">III</span>
        <div class="proj-section-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-section-content">
        <h2 class="proj-section-title">Singapore's Approach</h2>
        <div class="proj-prose">
          <p><em>Coming soon — MAS PSN02, the Digital Payment Token licensing regime under the Payment Services Act, and how the Travel Rule lands in practice at the S$1,500 threshold.</em></p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SECTION IV -->
    <div class="proj-section">
      <div class="proj-section-marker">
        <span class="proj-section-num">IV</span>
        <div class="proj-section-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-section-content">
        <h2 class="proj-section-title">The EU's Bet</h2>
        <div class="proj-prose">
          <p><em>Coming soon — MiCA, the Transfer of Funds Regulation, and the case for a unified 27-country passport with no de minimis Travel Rule threshold. How the 18-month grandfathering period creates an interim patchwork.</em></p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SECTION V -->
    <div class="proj-section">
      <div class="proj-section-marker">
        <span class="proj-section-num">V</span>
        <div class="proj-section-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-section-content">
        <h2 class="proj-section-title">Comparing the Two</h2>
        <div class="proj-prose">
          <p><em>Coming soon — different jurisdictions, different bets. Enforcement capacity, supervisory philosophy, and the question of which model travels well to mid-size emerging market regulators.</em></p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- LIVING NOTICE -->
    <div class="proj-notice">
      <span class="proj-notice-mark">◉</span>
      <p class="proj-notice-text">This piece is being written in stages as the research develops. Sections will be published as they are ready. Last updated: April 2026.</p>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
